Operation.Documentation:
This method initiates the assignment between members, guides and climbing weeks. If there is amember that remains unassigned at the end of the process, the method throws anInvalidInputException.

@author Asma Gandour
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method initiates the assignment between members, guides and climbing weeks. If there is amember that remains unassigned at the end of the process, the method throws anInvalidInputException. @author Asma Gandour
Operation.Name: initiateAssignmentForAllMembers

Operation.Documentation:
This method toggles the payment status of a Member "member". If the member has already paid, itthrows an exception.

@author Haroun Guessous
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method toggles the payment status of a Member "member". If the member has already paid, itthrows an exception. @author Haroun Guessous
Operation.Name: payment

Operation.Documentation:
This method starts all the trips for a given week. If the member is banned (due to no payment),the trip cannot be started.

@author Alexandre Chiasera
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method starts all the trips for a given week. If the member is banned (due to no payment),the trip cannot be started. @author Alexandre Chiasera
Operation.Name: startTrips

Operation.Documentation:
This method finished the trip for a Member "member".

@author Atreyi Srivastava, Asma Gandour
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method finished the trip for a Member "member". @author Atreyi Srivastava, Asma Gandour
Operation.Name: finishTrip

Operation.Documentation:
This method cancels the trip for a Member "member".

@author Mohammad Shaheer Bilal
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method cancels the trip for a Member "member". @author Mohammad Shaheer Bilal
Operation.Name: cancelTrip

Operation.Documentation:
Corresponding Feature: SetupNMCThis method attempts setting up the NMC application, if it fails to it throws an exception.

@author Haroun reviewed by Asma
Operation.Documentation_plain: Corresponding Feature: SetupNMCThis method attempts setting up the NMC application, if it fails to it throws an exception. @author Haroun reviewed by Asma
Operation.Name: setup

Parameter.Documentation: the user email
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the user email
Parameter.Name: email

Parameter.Documentation: the user email
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the user email
Parameter.Name: email

Operation.Documentation: this method needs to be implemented only by teams with seven team members

Parameter.Documentation: the user email
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the user email
Parameter.Name: email

Parameter.Documentation: the user password
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the user password
Parameter.Name: password

Parameter.Documentation: the user name
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the user name
Parameter.Name: name

Parameter.Documentation: the user's emergency contact
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the user's emergency contact
Parameter.Name: emergencyContact

Parameter.Documentation: the number of climbing weeks the user wishes to sign up for
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the number of climbing weeks the user wishes to sign up for
Parameter.Name: nrWeeks

Parameter.Documentation: states whether the user will hire a guide or not
Parameter.Documentation_plain: states whether the user will hire a guide or not
Parameter.Name: guideRequired

Parameter.Documentation: states whether the user will book a hotel or not
Parameter.Documentation_plain: states whether the user will book a hotel or not
Parameter.Name: hotelRequired

Parameter.Documentation: the items the user wishes to rent
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the items the user wishes to rent
Parameter.Name: itemNames

Parameter.Documentation: the item quantities for the rented items respectively
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the item quantities for the rented items respectively
Parameter.Name: itemQuantities

Parameter.Documentation: the user email
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the user email
Parameter.Name: email

Parameter.Documentation: the new password entered by the user
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the new password entered by the user
Parameter.Name: newPassword

Parameter.Documentation: the new name entered by the user
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the new name entered by the user
Parameter.Name: newName

Parameter.Documentation: the new emergency contact entered by the user
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the new emergency contact entered by the user
Parameter.Name: newEmergencyContact

Parameter.Documentation: the new number of weeks the user wishes to sign up for

Parameter.Name: newNrWeeks

Parameter.Documentation: states whether the user requires a guide or not
Parameter.Documentation_plain: states whether the user requires a guide or not
Parameter.Name: newGuideRequired

Parameter.Name: newHotelRequired

Parameter.Name: newItemNames

Parameter.Documentation: the quantities of the items newly added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the quantities of the items newly added
Parameter.Name: newItemQuantities

Operation.Documentation:
Feature: Update GuideUpdate the exiting information of a guide with new information of password, name and emergencycontact

@author Atreyi Srivastava

Operation.Name: updateGuide

Attribute.Documentation:
Feature: Register Guide

Registers a guide with information of email, password, name and emergency contact

@author Atreyi Srivastava
Attribute.Name: VALID_EMAIL_ADDRESS_REGEX

Operation.Documentation:
This method update an equipment with name oldName with a new name, weight and price per week.It starts by checking if the inputs are valid.

@author Mohammad Shaheer Bilal
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method update an equipment with name oldName with a new name, weight and price per week.It starts by checking if the inputs are valid. @author Mohammad Shaheer Bilal
Operation.Name: addEquipment

This method update an equipment with name oldName with a new name, weight and price per week.It starts by checking if the inputs are valid.

Operation.Name: updateEquipment

Operation.Documentation:
Corresponding Feature: DeleteEquipmentThis method deletes an equipment if it not in a bundle. Else, it throws an exception.

@author Asma Gandour
Operation.Documentation_plain: Corresponding Feature: DeleteEquipmentThis method deletes an equipment if it not in a bundle. Else, it throws an exception. @author Asma Gandour
Operation.Name: deleteEquipment

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the equipment to be deleted
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the equipment to be deleted
Parameter.Name: name

Operation.Documentation: this method does not need to be implemented by a team with five team members
Operation.Documentation_plain: this method does not need to be implemented by a team with five team members
Operation.Name: deleteEquipmentBundle

Operation.Documentation:
Corresponding Feature: ViewAssignmentThis method iterates over climbSafe's assignments, converts each one of them into a TOassignment and returns a list of these TO assignments.

@author Haroun Guessous
Operation.Documentation_plain: Corresponding Feature: ViewAssignmentThis method iterates over climbSafe's assignments, converts each one of them into a TOassignment and returns a list of these TO assignments. @author Haroun Guessous
Operation.Name: getAssignments
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: the list of TOAssignments for the current climbSafe
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: the list of TOAssignments for the current climbSafe

Operation.Documentation:
A helper method for deleteEquipment(). It iterates over climbSafe's list of equipments to findthe equipment with the name corresponding to the input name

@author Asma Gandour
Operation.Documentation_plain: A helper method for deleteEquipment(). It iterates over climbSafe's list of equipments to findthe equipment with the name corresponding to the input name @author Asma Gandour
Operation.Name: findEquipment
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: the equipment whose name corresponds to name
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: the equipment whose name corresponds to name

Parameter.Documentation: the name of the equipment to be found
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the name of the equipment to be found
Parameter.Name: name

Class.Documentation:
@author Tushar Srivastava - ID: 260922439

HotelController for Iteration 4
Class.Documentation_plain: @author Tushar Srivastava - ID: 260922439 HotelController for Iteration 4
Class.Name: HotelController

Operation.Documentation: This method gets called when the Add Hotel button is clicked on the GUI.It takes the user input and sends the necessary parameters (name, address, rating/nrStars) to the addHotel method in the Climbsafe Feature Set 7 controller.
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method gets called when the Add Hotel button is clicked on the GUI.It takes the user input and sends the necessary parameters (name, address, rating/nrStars) to the addHotel method in the Climbsafe Feature Set 7 controller.
Operation.Name: addHotel

Operation.Documentation: This method gets called when the Remove Hotel button is clicked on the GUI.It takes the user input and sends the necessary parameter to the deleteHotel(String name) method in the Climbsafe Feature Set 1 controller.
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method gets called when the Remove Hotel button is clicked on the GUI.It takes the user input and sends the necessary parameter to the deleteHotel(String name) method in the Climbsafe Feature Set 1 controller.
Operation.Name: removeHotel

Operation.Documentation: This method gets called when the Update Hotel button is clicked on the GUI.It takes the user input and sends the necessary parameters to the updateHotel(String oldName, String newName, String newAddress, int NewNrStars) method in the Climbsafe Feature Set 7 controller.
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method gets called when the Update Hotel button is clicked on the GUI.It takes the user input and sends the necessary parameters to the updateHotel(String oldName, String newName, String newAddress, int NewNrStars) method in the Climbsafe Feature Set 7 controller.
Operation.Name: updateHotel

Operation.Documentation: Method used to delete the current climbsafe system instance before the next test. This is effectivefor all scenerios in all feature files

Operation.Name: tearDown

Class.Documentation:
The step definitions were mostly implemented as a team, all the members of the team contributed

and worked on the implementation of all the methods, not only to the ones they were assigned to.
Class.Documentation_plain: The step definitions were mostly implemented as a team, all the members of the team contributed and worked on the implementation of all the methods, not only to the ones they were assigned to.
Class.Name: P11StepDefinitions

Operation.Documentation:
This function creates the ClimbSafe system and sets its parameters, and initialize the errormessage and error count.

@author Can Akin, Maxime Drouin
Operation.Documentation_plain: This function creates the ClimbSafe system and sets its parameters, and initialize the errormessage and error count. @author Can Akin, Maxime Drouin
Operation.Name: the_following_climb_safe_system_exists_p11

Operation.Documentation:
This function creates the guides with the given information form the Table into the climbSafesystem.

@author Anaëlle Drai Laguéns
Operation.Documentation_plain: This function creates the guides with the given information form the Table into the climbSafesystem. @author Anaëlle Drai Laguéns
Operation.Name: the_following_guides_exist_in_the_system_p11

This method calls the controller method and updates the guide information using it.

@author Oliver Cafferty

Operation.Name: the_guide_with_attempts_to_update_their_account_information_to_and_p11

Operation.Documentation:
This method asserts the error count is 0 and message is empty, finds the guide in the systemand checks whether the updated informations match the provided strings

@author Samuel Snodgrass
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method asserts the error count is 0 and message is empty, finds the guide in the systemand checks whether the updated informations match the provided strings @author Samuel Snodgrass
Operation.Name: their_guide_account_information_will_be_updated_and_is_now_and_p11

Operation.Documentation:
This method asserts whether the number of guides in the system corresponds to the providedinteger.

@author Lee Brickman
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method asserts whether the number of guides in the system corresponds to the providedinteger. @author Lee Brickman
Operation.Name: the_number_of_guides_in_the_system_is_p11

Operation.Documentation:
This method asserts whether the error string (which means the error that was caught), matchesthe required error string

@author Lee Brickman
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method asserts whether the error string (which means the error that was caught), matchesthe required error string @author Lee Brickman
Operation.Name: the_following_shall_be_raised_p11

Operation.Documentation:
This method asserts the guide information was not changed and corresponds to the previousinformation if an error occurs.

@author Lee Brickman, Samuel Snodgrass, Oliver Cafferty, Can Akin, Maxime Drouin, Anaëlle Drai Laguéns
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method asserts the guide information was not changed and corresponds to the previousinformation if an error occurs. @author Lee Brickman, Samuel Snodgrass, Oliver Cafferty, Can Akin, Maxime Drouin, Anaëlle Drai Laguéns
Operation.Name: the_guide_account_information_will_not_be_updated_and_will_keep_and_p11

Operation.Documentation:
This method executes a function and catches potential errors. In the case an error occurs, itstores the error message and increments error count

@author Oliver Cafferty
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method executes a function and catches potential errors. In the case an error occurs, itstores the error message and increments error count @author Oliver Cafferty
Operation.Name: callController

Method called by the gherkin guide deletion test to interact with the controller api undertest. The method deletes a specified guide through a specific controller method

Operation.Documentation:
Method used to check that the state of the model is exactly what is expected from the call tothe controller method used in previous test steps. Here, we make sure the specified guide doesnot exist in the system

Operation.Documentation:
This method is part of the "given" clause that creates a climbSafe object directly using themodel, in order to perform testing.

@author Samuel Valentine, Onyekachi Ezekwem, Rui Du, Youssof Mohamed Masoud.
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method is part of the "given" clause that creates a climbSafe object directly using themodel, in order to perform testing. @author Samuel Valentine, Onyekachi Ezekwem, Rui Du, Youssof Mohamed Masoud.
Operation.Name: the_following_climb_safe_system_exists_p16

Parameter.Documentation: : which includes the ClimbSafe object's attributes (i.e. StartDate, NrWeeks, and priceOfQuidePerWeek).
Parameter.Documentation_plain: : which includes the ClimbSafe object's attributes (i.e. StartDate, NrWeeks, and priceOfQuidePerWeek).
Parameter.Name: dataTable

Parameter.Name: dataTable

Parameter.Documentation_plain: : which represents the number of hotels that will remain in the system after deletion.
Parameter.Name: string

Operation.Documentation:
This helper method converts integer ratings for hotel to a valid HotelRating value.

@author Youssof Mohamed Masoud.
Operation.Documentation_plain: This helper method converts integer ratings for hotel to a valid HotelRating value. @author Youssof Mohamed Masoud.
Operation.Name: getRatingFromInteger
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: HotelRating : which represents the rating of the hotel.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: HotelRating : which represents the rating of the hotel.

Parameter.Documentation: : which represents the hotel rating as an integer number of stars.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: : which represents the hotel rating as an integer number of stars.
Parameter.Name: nrStars

Parameter.Documentation: this is the input to the method, which represents the application Then the three elements of dataTable (Date, number of weeks, Guide price/week) will be associatedwith the ClimbSafe system by transforming dataTable into a list of maps
Parameter.Documentation_plain: this is the input to the method, which represents the application Then the three elements of dataTable (Date, number of weeks, Guide price/week) will be associatedwith the ClimbSafe system by transforming dataTable into a list of maps
Parameter.Name: dataTable

Parameter.Documentation: contains the required data regarding each guide (email, password, name and emergency contact) that are coded to be associated with the system.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: contains the required data regarding each guide (email, password, name and emergency contact) that are coded to be associated with the system.
Parameter.Name: dataTable

Parameter.Documentation: is the input for the method There are seven elements of dataTable (email, password, name, emergencyContact, nrWeeks, guideRequired, hotelRequired) coded to beassociated with the system.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the input for the method There are seven elements of dataTable (email, password, name, emergencyContact, nrWeeks, guideRequired, hotelRequired) coded to beassociated with the system.
Parameter.Name: dataTable

Operation.Documentation:
When a guide tries to register, this code sends the inputs to the controller that check it isall correct and creates a guide if it is, otherwise returns the error and adds it to msg

@author Sebastien
Operation.Documentation_plain: When a guide tries to register, this code sends the inputs to the controller that check it isall correct and creates a guide if it is, otherwise returns the error and adds it to msg @author Sebastien
Operation.Name: a_new_guide_attempts_to_register_with_and_p3

Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the entered email of the guide to be checked
Parameter.Name: email

Parameter.Documentation: is the entered password of the guide to be checked
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the entered password of the guide to be checked
Parameter.Name: password

Parameter.Documentation: is the entered name of the guide to be checked
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the entered name of the guide to be checked
Parameter.Name: name

Parameter.Documentation: is the entered emergencyNumber to be checked
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the entered emergencyNumber to be checked
Parameter.Name: emergencyContact

Parameter.Documentation: this is the email of the guide
Parameter.Documentation_plain: this is the email of the guide
Parameter.Name: email

Parameter.Documentation: this is the password that the guide should use
Parameter.Documentation_plain: this is the password that the guide should use
Parameter.Name: password

Parameter.Documentation: this is the name of the guide
Parameter.Documentation_plain: this is the name of the guide
Parameter.Name: name

Parameter.Documentation: this is the guide's emergency contact
Parameter.Documentation_plain: this is the guide's emergency contact
Parameter.Name: emergencyContact
